from dbo.ips_receive_sign_imp_info_from_all
order by ${orderByClause}

order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ips_receive_sign_imp_info_from_all (id, source_system, supplier_system, src_order_no, src_order_Item, order_no, order_Item, model_no, data_type, qty, deviation_qty, deviation_reason, process_status, process_place, process_date, processor_code, create_time, create_user, invoice_no, invoice_batch_no, addition_info ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sourceSystem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierSystem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{srcOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{srcOrderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deviationQty,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deviationReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processPlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{processorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceBatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{additionInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

update dbo.ips_receive_sign_imp_info_from_all
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
source_system = #{record.sourceSystem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_system = #{record.supplierSystem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

src_order_Item = #{record.srcOrderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_Item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

deviation_qty = #{record.deviationQty,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
deviation_reason = #{record.deviationReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
process_status = #{record.processStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

process_date = #{record.processDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

invoice_no = #{record.invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_batch_no = #{record.invoiceBatchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
addition_info = #{record.additionInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
